# SHINES Headlight Restoration

> SHINES restores foggy, yellowed, and oxidized headlights to clear, like-new condition using a professional multi-stage sand-and-polish process finished with a UV-cured protective hard coat. Based in Ingelmunster, Belgium, with mobile service across Belgium and mail-in service across Europe.

## What SHINES does

Headlight restoration (and tail-light/lens restoration) for cars: removes oxidation, yellowing, haze, and UV damage from polycarbonate headlight lenses, then seals them with a UV-cured coating so clarity lasts. Restoration is a fast, low-cost alternative to replacing headlight units.

## Pricing (21% BTW included)

- Single headlight restoration: from €89
- Pair (both headlights): from €149 — most popular
- Mail-in restoration (Europe): from €129
- Mobile "we come to you" (Belgium): travel fee from €59 within 25 km
- 1-year clarity guarantee on all restorations

## Service options

- Garage visit: drop off at the workshop in Ingelmunster (free on-site parking). Turnaround about 30–60 minutes per light, 45–90 minutes for both — coating is fully cured before you drive away.
- Mobile service (Belgium): SHINES travels to you within range.
- Mail-in service (Europe): ship your headlights to the workshop; turnaround about 3–5 business days plus shipping.

## Coverage

- Country: Belgium (garage + mobile)
- Europe: mail-in to Belgium, France, Germany, Netherlands, Luxembourg, United Kingdom, and more
- Belgium service locations: https://shines.be/locations
- Europe countries: https://shines.be/europe

## Common questions

- How much does headlight restoration cost? From €89 for one headlight and from €149 for a pair, 21% BTW included.
- How long does it take? About 30–60 minutes per headlight at the garage; mail-in is about 3–5 business days plus shipping.
- How long do results last? SHINES finishes with a UV-cured hard coat and backs it with a 1-year clarity guarantee; results typically last far longer than DIY kits.
- Is restoration cheaper than replacing headlights? Yes — restoration from €149 is a fraction of the cost of new headlight units.
- Do you come to me? Yes, mobile service is available across Belgium; elsewhere in Europe use mail-in.
- Can I ship my headlights? Yes, mail-in service covers Europe from €129.
